title: API Terms of Service Update - Enterprise Rate Limiting Policy (2026-Q1)
body:
EFFECTIVE DATE: March 1, 2026

1. PURPOSE AND SCOPE

This policy amendment updates the TechCorp API Terms of Service to reflect changes to the enterprise tier rate limiting thresholds. This internal policy governs the application of the new rate limits across all API consumer tiers and serves as the definitive reference for engineering, product, and customer-facing documentation.

2. RATE LIMITING POLICY UPDATE

Prior Policy: Enterprise tier subscribers were subject to a maximum of 1,000 requests per minute (req/min).

Updated Policy (Effective March 1, 2026): Enterprise tier subscribers shall now be permitted to make up to 5,000 requests per minute (req/min).

Rate Limit Tier Structure (Post-Update):
- Standard Tier: 100 req/min
- Professional Tier: 500 req/min
- Enterprise Tier: 5,000 req/min

3. IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENTS

3.1 API Gateway Configuration: All API gateway instances must be configured to enforce the new 5,000 req/min threshold for enterprise-tier API keys, effective immediately upon policy ratification.

3.2 Rate Limit Headers: API responses shall continue to include X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, and X-RateLimit-Reset headers per existing standards. Values shall reflect the tier-appropriate limits.

3.3 Enforcement Mechanism: Rate limit enforcement shall employ fixed-window counting, with each minute constituting one window. Requests exceeding the tier limit shall receive HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) responses with Retry-After headers indicating the reset time.

4. CUSTOMER COMMUNICATION

4.1 Existing enterprise subscribers shall be notified of this rate limit increase via official product announcement and email notification within 7 business days.

4.2 Updated API documentation shall be published to reflect the new thresholds and shall prominently note the effective date of this change.

4.3 Support team shall be briefed on the change and provided with response scripts for customer inquiries.

5. MONITORING AND REVIEW
